titleStmt.title: SII 9.291: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 291. (A.R. No. 497 of 1914.) ON A SLAB LYING BEFORE THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT HIREHADAGALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 771, Prajāpati, Pushya, amāvāsyā, Sōmavāra, Vyatīpata, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. Śaka 771 corresponding to A.D. 849 was Śukla and not Prajōtpatti. The Pushya Amāvāsyā of Prajōtpatti corresponded to A.D. 851 January 5, Monday; it was not the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that his feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Māhēndra, “lord of Kāñchī,” who was ruling the country with Marandale as the boundary, made a grant of land for the service of the god Mūlasthānadēva in the presence of the 120 Mahājaṇas of the village Posavaḍaṅgile. In the same cyclic year Prajāpati, Chaitra śu, 1, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 851 March 7 Saturday, not Monday, a certain Malliyaṇṇa and his father Bāchimayya are said to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Mallikārjunadēva. In the Śaka year cited there was no Tribhuvanamalladēva and the date is too early for any Tribhuvanamalla. Moreover the characters of the record belong to the 11-12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadumōpajī
vi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabuda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhī
śvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi śubhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijavijeyakuḷa
kamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ nāmādipraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mā
hēṁdraṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttaṁ kōgaḷiyalirddu maraṁdale ma
ryyādeyāge nāḍanāḷuttamire . Eseva noṇaṁbavāḍiyoḷagaggada kōga
ḷināḍaleṁtu baṁṇisuvaḍamoppuguṁ posavaḍaṁgile poṁgaḷasaṁgaḷiṁde
māḍisida mahēśvarālayadinoppuva viṣṇugrihōtukaruṁgaḷimdaśadriśamappa vi
prabhavanaṁgaḷinōduva vēdadanādaraṁ . svasti yamaniyama(niyama)svādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnarōpasanāgnihōtradvijagu
rudēvatāpūjātatupararuṁ yajanayājanādhyayanamadhyāpanadāna
pratigrahaśaṭukar(ṁ)manirataruṁ sakaḷaśāstraviśāradaruṁ dhar(ṁ)mmaprati
pāḷakarumappa śrīmadanādiyagrahāraṁ posavaḍaṁgileyūraḍeya
pramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbarumirddu sakanripakālātītasaṁva
tsaraśataṁgaḷēḷunūreppattoṁdu prajāpatisaṁvatsarada puśyadamavāsye
sōmavāra byatīpāta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadalli māhēṁdraṁ biṭṭa Ereya
keyi tāḻiyōṇiyiṁ mūḍalu koḷabeyadāriyiṁ paḍuva nālvattaṟa pa
sugeyoḷage mattarirppattanālku 24 goravagaṭṭada keḷage khaṁḍugavedeya gadde
yiṁtinitumaṁ biṭṭaru yilli puṭṭidāya mūlasthānadēvara nivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphu
ṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkamallade peṟargguṁ salladī sthānadalu puṭṭida sōmasaṁbhutapōdhana
ra saṁtānamallade peṟarggirasali Ī dharmmavanagrahāraṁ sarvvabhādhaparihāravāgi rakṣi
suvaru . svasti śrīmatu prajāpatasaṁvatsarada caitra sudda pāḍiva sōmavāra pu(ṁ)ṇyatithi
yalu rēkeyamādimayyanāyakara maga bācimayyanuṁ maga malliyaṁṇanuṁ pura
ssaravāgi mallikārjjunadēvargge Ālagaṭṭada haḷuginalu biṭṭagadde ka(ṁ)mma nūṟamūvattu
cippinakaṭṭadalu Arahaṭada baṁmiseṭṭiyiṁ baḍagalu gaddekaṁmavaṟunūṟu duggimēgeyya
keḷage mūṟu mattaru hattu kaṁba keI Iḍeyagaṭadoḷage caḍibāciya paḍuva
lu nanūru kaṁba tōṭa mūlastānagēriOḷage rudrabhaṭṭana maneIṁ pa
ḍuvalu Ekaii Ekaii 2 mane baḍagavāgilu mustannadēva
rgge gavarēśvaradēvara mūḍaṇadduvake Ekai Agalada mūḍaṇaddu
vake mūlastanadēvargge gāṇa mānya dēvara kaṁmatavage vaḍikala
mānyabarase harikaṟuIna māḍuvarsattavaraguḍiya
kaṟuge mūlastānadēvargalade melada dēvargge sāladu
haṟekaṟa sōmanagaṁ pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍuvalli mūlastānadēvarige nā
ku mattaru keI dēvarakeIya baḍageyalu harekāra sōma biṭṭa yiṁtī
dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisvuvaru nūṟipadiṁbaru . Anityāni sarīrā
ṇi vibhavō naiva sāsvataṁ . Anityaṁ sannihitaṁ mrityuḥ karttabyaṁ
dharmmasaṁgrahaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
